about:
Founder, CTO, agency owner, game dev hobbyist, civic-tech leader, and digital democracy activist.

Currently based in London, I'm a seasoned technology leader with over a decade of experience building engineering teams and co-founding Series-A startups across London, Melbourne, San Francisco, and Manila.

As CTO and technical co-founder, I've led companies that collectively processed over $50 million in transactions, including Slerp, LawAdvisor Ventures, Ticketbase (powering events for GitHub, Facebook, and Martha Stewart), and premium e-commerce solutions handling millions in monthly transactions.

I also founded BetterGov.ph, a civic-tech movement focusing on data transparency and digital democracy in the Philippines. Currently have 3600+ members in Discord and supporters all over the world.

I also founded Mashup Garage, a premium technology consultancy with operations in London and Manila. We partner with ambitious startups and enterprises to transform breakthrough ideas into market-leading products through our team of 40+ elite developers.

My expertise spans full-stack architecture, team leadership, and scaling products from concept to Series-A funding.
company_description: Skillstore is a knowledge marketplace for creators. You can share what you know through short videos to build your personal brand, to build your email list, and to build your income.

experiences.description: Skillstore is where creators become the new educators. We're the platform built for people who actually DO the work, not just talk about it. While traditional education pushes theory, we're here for creators sharing real skills that get real results. Think of us as the rebellion against outdated courses that don't deliver transformation.
experiences.title: CTO / Co-Founder

experiences.description:
BetterGov is a volunteer-led tech initiative committed to creating #civictech projects aimed at making government more transparent, efficient, and accessible to citizens.

Our goal is to support various open source initiatives, to promote, to consolidate, and to empower builders!

We commit to provide:
- Infrastructure, tools, and more!
- Organize tech hackathons
- Data and API endpoints
- Help finding the right people and resource persons
- Mentorship from industry veterans
- Finding a tech team
- An office space 

More info:
https://technode.global/2025/09/21/bettergov-ph-is-an-open-community-model-for-citizen-focused-digital-services/
experiences.title: Founder

experiences.description:
I founded Neon Playground in London as a creative technology studio where I develop innovative software products and collaborate with visionary founders. Our focus is on transforming bold ideas into impactful digital experiences.

Currently, I'm working on several cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of what's possible in software development. 

I'm actively seeking like-minded founders and creators who share a passion for building exceptional products. 

If you have a compelling idea or are looking for a technical co-founder with a track record of turning concepts into reality, I'd love to connect and explore how we can create something remarkable together.
experiences.title: Founder + Builder

experiences.description:
A premium technology consultancy specialising in product development and technical leadership, with  operations in London and Manila. We architect scalable solutions and build world-class engineering teams for ambitious startups and forward-thinking enterprises.

Our expertise spans the complete product lifecycle—from concept validation through market launch and beyond. With a curated team of 70+ developers and software engineering specialists, we've consistently delivered breakthrough products that drive measurable business growth.

We partner with visionary founders and established companies who demand excellence in execution. 

If you're building something transformative and need a technical partner who can accelerate your journey from idea to market leadership, let's explore how we can create extraordinary products together.
experiences.location: Metro Manila, National Capital Region, Philippines
experiences.title: Founder

experiences.description:
A premium e-commerce platform designed specifically for urban retail brands, seamlessly bridging the gap between physical storefronts and digital commerce with on-demand delivery capabilities.

As the founding CTO, I architected and built the entire product ecosystem from the ground up. My hands-on approach encompassed every critical component of the platform: a robust GraphQL API serving as the system backbone, an intuitive consumer-facing marketplace, a comprehensive merchant management suite, and an innovative visual design tool that empowered retailers to create distinctive brand experiences without technical expertise.

I also developed our internal analytics and business intelligence dashboards, providing actionable insights that drove strategic decisions. Additionally, I spearheaded integrations with key industry partners including Deliverect and Comtrex, ensuring seamless operations across the retail technology stack. 

This comprehensive technical leadership resulted in a scalable platform that enabled dozens of premium brands to successfully transition to omnichannel retail, processing millions of pounds in monthly transactions and demonstrating the platform's ability to handle enterprise-level commerce volumes.
experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer / Co-Founder

experiences.description:
One of Australia's leading legal technology companies, now expanding to the UK market with innovative digital legal services.

As CTO, I lead product development and technical architecture for LawAdvisor's pioneering legal platform. I've built our core technology stack including intelligent lawyer-client matching, secure communication systems, case management tools, and automated document generation—all while maintaining strict legal industry compliance standards.
experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer / Founding Member

experiences.description:
As CTO, I drive both product strategy and technical architecture for Ticketbase, overseeing the complete product lifecycle from strategic roadmap development through feature delivery and market launch. My leadership encompasses building scalable ticketing infrastructure that meets the demands of world-class events and enterprise clients.

Under my technical direction, we've successfully delivered ticketing solutions for industry-leading brands including GitHub, Martha Stewart, Facebook, and other Fortune 500 companies. Our platform has processed over $50 million in transactions across thousands of global events, demonstrating both the scalability of our architecture and the trust major brands place in our technology.

I've architected a robust, enterprise-grade platform capable of handling high-volume ticket sales, complex event configurations, and seamless payment processing while maintaining the reliability and security standards required by global brands. This technical foundation has positioned Ticketbase as a trusted partner for premium events that demand flawless execution.
experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer / Co-Founder

experiences.description:
A forward-thinking web engineering consultancy I founded, dedicated to pushing the boundaries of digital product development.

As CTO and Founder of Proudcloud, I established a collaborative approach to client partnerships built on shared innovation and technical excellence. Rather than traditional vendor relationships, we became true technology partners, inspiring clients to think bigger while delivering breakthrough digital experiences.

I led both technical vision and hands-on development, specializing in complex web applications that required sophisticated engineering and creative problem-solving. Our focus on cutting-edge technologies and meticulous craftsmanship resulted in solutions that consistently exceeded client expectations and drove meaningful business impact.
experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer / Co-Founder

experiences.description:
As CTO of Artisteconnect, I built the technical foundation that enabled artists to connect directly with supporters and fund their creative work. I developed the core platform architecture, payment processing systems, and user experience that made arts crowdfunding accessible and intuitive for both creators and backers.

My technical leadership focused on creating tools that understood the unique needs of the creative community—from project showcasing capabilities to flexible funding models that supported diverse artistic endeavors.
experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer / Co-Founder

experiences.description:
As Senior Software Engineering Lead, I led development teams in building scalable Ruby on Rails applications while maintaining hands-on coding responsibilities. I established engineering standards, mentored developers, and made key architectural decisions that drove product success.

My role combined strategic technical leadership with practical software development, ensuring high-quality code delivery while fostering a collaborative team culture that consistently exceeded project goals.
experiences.title: Software Engineering Lead

experiences.description: Rubyist and Builder. Eventually acquired by Exist Software Labs.
experiences.title: Software Engineer
